title: The best fps boosting modpack
description: This modpack includes many essential fps boosting mods that will improve your game experience ten-fold. There will also be mods that improve your render distance, some that improve memory usage, and some that will reduce entity lag.
body:
This modpack is aimed to improve your gaming experience ten-fold wither your a hardcore gamer or a player who needs a modpack to fix all of their problems. My modpack focuses on 4 main things, one enhancing your rendering, two removing the lagginess of hidden entites and large amounts of exp orbs, three improving your experience on larger servers, four by reducing the amount of memory your minecraft uses while playing.

I hope you enjoy this modpack, I made the modpack from personal expreince while playing minecraft and don't froget to ture off vsync ;).

Please follow so you could see my next update.
